text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right. Now that I've got new shoelaces, I guess
it's time to head to training.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The banner at that motorcycle shop over there...
Th-there's no doubt about it!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's a remake of the legendary JUV1331 model!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I can't take it! I've just gotta go over there and
check it out!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Aughhh! Look at this dark gray sheen! It's so bold!
So in your face!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Man, it's too cool! Just the best! It's even cooler
than it looks in pictures!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Chances like this just don't come up any normal
day. I gotta take it all in! Till it's permanently
burned into my retinas!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka, completely glued to the motorcycle of
her dreams, ends up neglecting her training...
